seoTitle: Vancouver Peninsula vs Varley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Vancouver Peninsula and Varley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Vancouver Peninsula vs Varley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Vancouver Peninsula and Varley.
heading: Vancouver Peninsula vs Varley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Vancouver Peninsula, Western Australia and Varley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Varley has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Vancouver Peninsula (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Vancouver Peninsula or Varley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Vancouver Peninsula has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Varley scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Vancouver Peninsula scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Varley scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Vancouver Peninsula or Varley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Varley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
